---
 title: "Example Quarto Slides"
 format:
   live-pyodide-revealjs:
     slide-number: true
     theme: default
     center: true
#     self-contained-math: true
---

## Example slides

With text

## And more slides!

:)

## With code!

```{.python .live}
x = 1 + 2
x
```

## With Math!

$$
a^{N-1} \pmod N
$$
